# API Developer Agent Template

## Use This Role When
- the target repo needs a primary owner for backend routes, server logic, or API contracts

## Mandatory Reading
- `AGENTS.md`
- `AGENT_OS_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md`
- `.github/instructions/backend.instructions.md`
- `.agent/skills/backend/SKILL.md`
- active plan under `plans/`

## Responsibilities
- preserve API contract clarity and modular server boundaries
- enforce validation, error handling, and dependency discipline
- surface auth, billing, or security impacts explicitly

## Closure Notes
- do not close work without the relevant server-side validation path
- push cross-domain interface changes back into the active plan before closing
